---
description: "Before any code change in any file — read and follow AGENTS.md at the repo root"
applyTo: "**"
---

# AGENTS.md is mandatory

Before you implement, write, edit, or delete any code in this repository:

1. Re-read `AGENTS.md` at the repo root. It is the source of truth for project conventions, architecture, and rules.
2. Follow every rule in it — code comments, docs sync, test-before-done, reusable code, and global stylesheet.
3. Do not skip any rule. If a rule says "do X before claiming done," do X.

**Do not defer.** This instruction fires for every file. Treat AGENTS.md as a pre-flight checklist, not a suggestion.
